description: You are an electrical engineer sourcing parts for a prototype. On DigiKey (www.digikey.com), locate three in-stock components: a Texas Instruments NE555P Timer IC (PDIP-8), a PN2222A NPN Transistor (TO-92), and the cheapest in-stock 10uF Electrolytic Capacitor (Through Hole, >=25V). Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'BOM Research' containing the product pages for these components. Download the NE555P datasheet to '~/Documents/NE555P_datasheet.pdf'. Generate a BOM report at '~/Documents/bom_report.json' with keys 'ne555p', 'pn2222a', and 'capacitor', including 'manufacturer', 'digikey_part_number', 'unit_price' (float), and 'quantity_available' (int) for each.
